title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Blackbeard, Unknown person #1, Kid, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Sabo as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
